programmes.show_description: ...Victims Unit. As Carisi begins the long-anticipated trial of Sir Toby Moore, the SVU faces setbacks in several other cases.
A night at the opera ends in murder when a young violinist is pushed to her death.
A bridesmaid is found dead in a cheap motel room, and Goren and Eames suspect that the victim had a personal connection to her killer.
A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Knockout: US drama. Leon Vance investigates the murder of an old friend, who he claims is a former marine - but Gibbs suspects he might be settling an old score.
Hide and Seek: Crime Series. When a young boy finds a murder weapon, the team must trace ownership of the gun to find who used it last and who was murdered.
Dead Reckoning: US drama. Gibbs teams up with an old foe, CIA agent Trent Kort, to hunt down an international criminal at the top of NCIS's most wanted list.
Crime drama. When an insurance executive is found dead, the prime suspect is a father whose child is dying of leukemia and was denied a life-saving drug by her insurers.
Crime drama series. When two roommates are found bludgeoned to death, the investigation focuses on a handyman.
Missing: Crime drama. When a state senator's aide goes missing, Briscoe and Green try to determine who her last contacts were as the senator himself becomes a suspect.
An investigation into the murder of a rock singer is hampered by the unorthodox tactics of a cop-turned-writer.
McCoy and Southerlyn try to circumvent the law to access some crucial evidence.
When a skeleton is found, the team discover that the victim was thought to have died during the September 11 attack on the World Trade Center.
Power Down: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. An armed assault on an internet service provider leaves a female navy officer dead.
Crime drama series. The team investigates the macabre murder of a marine who was guarding a gifted young girl with access to high level military secrets.
US drama. The team investigates the cold-blooded murder of a devoutly religious marine in what appears to be a hate crime.
NCIS investigates a murder related to a car that begins driving on its own.
While the squad seeks three women, who allegedly drug and rob wealthy men, the case leads to personal con-nections for both Benson and Kat.
Rollins returns to an old case when a child, who is sent to a juvenile detention centre, is released following his 18th birthday.
When the squad tries to solve an assault in Central Park, they are hampered by their own blind spots and a community that is losing trust in the police.
Rollins and Kat respond to a dangerous domestic violence call while Fin gives his deposition in the lawsuit against him.
Frank's esteem for an old friend proves to be a mistake, while Jamie asks Erin for help apprehending a perp who shot at him. Eddie clashes with her new boss.
Frank takes to heart Jamie's case involving the suspicious death of his friend's wife. Erin gets an unsolved robbery case that's impossible to crack without Anthony's help.
A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman's impatience lands her in hot water when she's pulled over for tailgating.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Toxic: US drama. The death of a marine unearths a top-secret military research programme. Meanwhile, Abby is called away to assist with an ongoing medical project.
Legend - Part 1: US drama. The murder of a Marine brings the team into contact with the Office of Special Projects in LA. Tony becomes concerned about Ziva's behaviour.
Legend - Part 2: Crime drama. Gibbs and McGee work with the NCIS Office of Special Projects (OSP) to track down a terrorist cell in LA. The agents question Ziva's loyalties.
Crime drama series. When a young psychologist is found stabbed to death, Briscoe and Green believe the apparent mugging may be linked to files on her computer.
Born Again: Crime drama series. When a girl is found dead from suffocation in Central Park, Briscoe and Green find that her adoptive mother may inadvertently be responsible.
When a teenager is found dead, Briscoe and Green suspect that her death is linked to a website run by a group of popular boys at her school.
Briscoe and Green think the murder of a businessman was a professional hit, and fingers point to the wife and her lover.
Briscoe and Green investigate a star baseball player in connection with a murder. Was he driven to murder his steroid-dealing chauffeur?
When a limousine driver is found dead in the park, a star major league baseball player who was being blackmailed becomes the prime suspect.
Ignition: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. McGee takes the lead when a navy test pilot is found dead wearing an experimental jet pack.
Flesh and Blood: Crime drama series. The agents investigate a suspected assassination attempt on a member of the Saudi royal family.
Jet Lag: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. DiNozzo and Ziva find themselves trapped on a transatlantic flight with an anonymous assassin.
A student is accused of killing his teacher; when the suspect's age puts the case in limbo, Price and Maroun put the school's policies on trial.
Garland asks Benson to investigate a strange domestic violence case when his neighbour is found injured.
Benson and Rollins try to help a homeless single mother who's being trafficked in exchange for safe housing.
The squad interrogates a group of college roommates when one of them disappears during COVID-19 lock-down.
